textByHash.1919b19da08a498fc40ccbd9ab236a5c85a56f41: Hello there! Welcome to my special antiques boutique.
textByHash.8e36575a777c37a6d22b579d60c5dd650e11d491: As a matter of fact, I do! However, it's the last in stock and I'm not likely to get more for a while so it's highly prized amongst the wizards at the moment.
textByHash.498c1a7a9c0974117c9c2a88910cfe7ca26846e9: It's not easy to get so much rust together, even if I do come across it more often than most people with cleaning these rusty swords up!
textByHash.da03ba3e4bcee22799b6ddbbaaf01ee6b95d154e: Yes, iron oxide is more commonly referred to as rust. As for a price, hmmm...well...let me think now...I could give it to you for the price of...
textByHash.6b616e555bac4e586e3d684c92e6182f4bc838c2: I need a nice mattress to sleep on! I haven't had a decent night's sleep in an ice-age...could you take this stodgy mattress down to Rantz in the ogre area and ask him to fill it with prime chompy bird feathers please?
textByHash.1331d070f0d222fbdf2ffa655ff6eebf89a03c6a: Well, er, I wouldn't have said it quite that way...
textByHash.66221a2754979776ddacb7f8f44b681a740a3d1c: Great, many thanks indeed! Here's the mattress!
textByHash.6c391176ff0a11455c337695dfdaeec9d16d2687: Well, that's a shame, but come back and see me if you change your mind.
textByHash.879272c0da9ce013343af32cc4cd5982efba9702: You need to take that stodgy mattress I gave you to Rantz and ask him to fill it with feathers! Then, bring it back to me and I'll give you some iron oxide.
textByHash.553d4961ff3590f41e1cf66cd12c4af10efd419f: Yes, but I had to pay for this myself so you'd better pay me for losing my last one...it cost 100 gold!
textByHash.5e2d2236dc0b27ba41d86d9f2768db9fafbb9b08: Okay, thanks a lot, here's the mattress!
textByHash.95481322e689d5e46b4f1916441363992b947daa: Well, don't expect your iron oxide any time soon then!
textByHash.bfe7e2c876288b542e1492489a24a6d86cceeec2: Great! Let's have a look then.
textByHash.cb496734aa71ce99ba8e6a378c48fde2c0601ed3: Great! Here's the iron oxide I promised you!
textByHash.9365cf4581608a4cff4205f2e3249753d30e16e8: Okay, but I'm going to have to charge you I'm afraid. 200 coins.
textByHash.48d151889dc65dd433e7594847fb133998730897: Sorry, but I have to make a living.
textByHash.765e098372201dd1cfc5e8d58a3325f12b45c3f3: Suit yourself... I have plenty of other customers.
textByHash.3158e9686736f73d713cc08df3a71fdd6b26dae4: I'm a specialist at identifying rare and antique weapons, specifically swords, but I plan to branch out. If you have any old and rusty weapons that you want me to check out, just show them to me, pay me 100 Gold and
textByHash.876ea3b5de33ca6a8bc547d5ded3aba448d730ad: I'll see if you have an antique on your hands.
textByHash.d868e7a858642cb44c3ed3296402e4c94137825c: I can also repair some antique weapons and armours, just show me the item and I'll let you know if I can repair it and for how much.
textByHash.64e1faf85f3966fe43ba57788de63fdb0278532b: Well, pay me 100 Gold and I'll see if any rusty swords that you've found are actually worth anything. Some of them might be worth some money! If it's an antique item though, I reserve the right to purchase it
textByHash.2597fba580f7211de06a06527371da7852fc53dc: immediately for adding to my own personal collection. I'll give you fair price for it.
textByHash.a6e44da3fe2ad49f9eceff89ff966b08c60e37d6: If I can reclaim the sword with my own specialist skills, I'll return it to you in peak condition. If it's an antique, I'll just give you what I think it's worth and I generally pay quite well. However, if it's just a piece of junk, I'll
textByHash.a08c5d528343742fa784a7c4b4ef819eb290a7dc: simply give you the bad news and get rid of the item for you.
textByHash.1d876cb8605e291c4df9e1acec29d7cf33f4d2b4: Sorry my friend, but you don't seem to have any swords that need to be identified.
textByHash.8dc8ef42c37f22b7ca514eeb5055582c1a740dc5: Sorry my friend, but you don't seem to have enough money to cover my fee!
textByHash.e9d9e9ce23ade42924e7e116280ddbc482652ead: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a bronze sword.
textByHash.0b3354bb66fbaa7430b81c32e3e8f2617ab0b96b: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a bronze long sword.
textByHash.63af1aa31261e1eca695942b90aad724f5c9a3af: There you go my friend, it turned out to be an iron sword.
textByHash.f80e115021df880b964dfd49414e8a4895869396: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a long sword.
textByHash.41fa64a4643825e9fdfee9f789cc7eedb6940267: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a steel sword.
textByHash.daf220b6564563cd3ee3bf3649ad661d338c83e8: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a steel long sword.
textByHash.09f3016ef6256742b45faaa459de81e03458b961: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a black sword.
textByHash.d292e2601e33fc6530d4ccb1dd31cc7cd0eb49c2: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a black longsword.
textByHash.79667d2c73875ecc1268de4102c798109f9fc47f: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a mithril sword.
textByHash.5b03e78e7b9d02a8661742594f32cee5ee9a1419: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a mithril long sword.
textByHash.00724bfb9e396b5bf1c70b472f689916c462ee45: Sorry my friend, but the item wasn't worth anything. I've disposed of it for you.
textByHash.e731a22301c39cd841839ffb84c565034623cece: Wow! The item you gave me was a very rare antique...no real use...but hey, it's worth some money!
textByHash.b2c1ed90da123af7b7f32cbe7637edcde73f1863: That's a fair price for the item! I'll add it to my collection!
textByHash.6f82f357070202897454a19cc21414139b6d2812: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a bronze scimitar.
textByHash.fe41f30db68a578f3b0fb3a76c1675aa4d5a77b3: There you go my friend, it turned out to be an iron scimitar.
textByHash.4b8112b476c6dcec2ab3cba024b1ab131f43b0fe: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a steel scimitar.
textByHash.95037edd962a9912462da56f60cc38b4becf934f: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a black scimitar.
textByHash.cea29718d0d74999aa79c4755e6f01bb10a3f6d9: There you go my friend, it turned out to be a mithril scimitar.
